body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

**Towards the neurobiology of insomnia: Asystematic review of neuroimaging studies.**. Sleep Med Rev.. PMID: 38056381. DOI: 10.1016/j.smrv.2023.101878. Insomnia disorder signifies amajor public health concern. The development of neuroimaging techniques has permitted to investigate brain mechanisms at astructural and functional level. The present systematic review aims at shedding light on functional, structural, and metabolic substrates of insomnia disorder by integrating the available published neuroimaging data.
